reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All 3 gates passed. Gate 1 (Dead Code): function has 2+ non-test callers in proposer.go and engine_client.go. Gate 2 (Trust Boundary): not a trust boundary issue — vulnerability is in CL's own validation logic (missing check on kzg.ComputeCells output), not in trusting Engine API data. Gate 3 (Scope): in-scope PeerDAS functionality (EIP-7594, Fusaka-specific). Spec deviation confirmed: code does not validate that kzg.ComputeCells returns exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB (128) cells before constructing CellsAndProofs struct. Attack path is conditional on c-kzg-4844 library bug (no concrete evidence of such bug). Defense-in-depth validation gap. Severity: Prysm has 31% CL share, Medium threshold (>5% impact) is appropriate.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: EIP-7594 PeerDAS: Each blob must produce exactly CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB (128) cell-proof pairs
